title: WorkerTrust
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/worker-trust.json — the worker trust state projection consumed by the orchestrator, launch gate, state reconciler, and heartbeat monitor. Defines per-worker-class trust defaults, trustScore input factors, and scheduling rules. See docs/ai-native/worker-trust.md for trust semantics and docs/ai-native/worker-trust-schema.md for field-level documentation.

markerVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this trust projection was captured or last updated.

description.description: Human-readable description of this trust projection.

workerClasses.description: Per-worker-class trust defaults. Each key is a worker class name.

trustScore.description: Trust score computation configuration: inputs, weights, and formula.

inputs.description: Weighted inputs that compose the composite trust score. Each input is normalized to [0.0, 1.0] before weighting.

formula.description: Human-readable formula description, e.g. 'weightedSum(inputs) clamped to [0.0, 1.0]'.

note.description: Optional note about formula usage or overrides.

scheduling.description: Scheduling rules that map trust scores to launch actions.

minTrustToLaunch.description: Minimum trust score required to launch a worker. Below this, the worker is blocked.

highTrustThreshold.description: Trust score at or above which a worker gets standard launch (no extra monitoring).

rules.description: Ordered scheduling rules mapping trust score ranges to actions.

defaultTrustScore.description: Baseline trust score for this worker class in [0.0, 1.0].

allowedHealthStates.description: Health states in which this worker class is permitted to launch. Hard gate checked before trust score computation.

riskTier.description: Risk classification for this worker class.

layer.description: Backend worker layer this class belongs to.

note.description: Optional human-readable rationale for the trust defaults.

type.description: Data type of the input value.

weight.description: Weight of this input in the composite trust score. All weights should sum to 1.0.

description.description: What this input measures and how it affects trust.

values.description: Allowed enum values when type is 'enum'.

range.description: Valid range [min, max] when type is 'float'.

action.description: Action to take when the condition is met.

description.description: What happens when this rule fires.
